entidades_recuperadas.texto:
Concept: Class
Ontology: s4inma_2019-04-30.n3 (CORE)
URI: https://saref.etsi.org/saref4inma/Area
Label: Area
Definition: A subclass of s4bldg:BuildingSpace used to define the physical spaces of the building. According to IEC 62264, areas are physical, geographical or logical groupings of resources determined by the site. A site can be divided in areas, whereas areas contain work centers.s.

Concept: Class
Ontology: bot.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#Zone
Label: Zóna
Definition: 区域是物理世界或虚拟世界的一部分，既位于现实空间中又可在3D空间中拓展。bot:Zone的子集包括bot:Site, bot:Building, bot:Storey, or bot:Space。bot:Zone实例可包含其他bot:Zone实例，从而可以对区域进行分组或细分。 同时，bot：Zone的实例也可以与其他bot：Zone实例相邻。最后，bot：Zone可以实例化为bot：Element的两个关系，它们可以包含在（bot：containsElement）中，或者与其相邻（bot：adjacentElement）。

Concept: Property
Ontology: bot.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#containsElement
Label: comtém elemento
Definition: Relation to a building element contained in a zone.

Concept: Class
Ontology: bot.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#Storey
Label: طبقه
Definition: بخشی از دنیای فیزیکی، و یا مجازی که اساساً هم در دنیا وجود دارد و دارای حدود مکانی سه بعدی میباشند. یک bot:Storey در یک یا چند ساختمان قرار میگیرد، و دربرگیرنده‌ی یک یا چند فضا است که به صورت افقی به هم متصل شده اند.
طبقه های یک ساختمان از طریق اتصالات عمودی مانند آسانسور و پله به هم متصل میشوند. یک bot:Storey  هر دو منطقه بالا و زیر زمین را پوشش می‎دهد، برای مثال، یک ساختمان با 21 طبقه بالای زمین، یک طبقه همکف و3 طبفه یک ساختمان با 25 عنصر  bot:Storey  است.

Concept: Property
Ontology: bot.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#containsZone
Label: contém zona
Definition: رابطه با زیر منطقه های یک منطقه اصلی. به عنوان مثال یک منطقه فضایی می تواند در یک منطقه طبقه قرار گرفته باشد که آن به خودی خود در یک منطقه ساختمان قرار گرفته. رابطه‌ی  bot:containsZone یک رابطه‌ی انتقالی است. به این معنا که در مثال قبلی رابطه‌ی bot:containsZone بین بخش فضا و بخش ساختمان نیز برقرار میشود.

Concept: Property
Ontology: building.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#containsZone
Label: contains zone
Definition: Relationship to the subzones of a major zone. A space zone could for instance be contained in a storey zone which is further contained in a building zone.

Concept: Property
Ontology: building.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#hasStorey
Label: has storey
Definition: Relation to storeys contained in a zone.

Concept: Class
Ontology: facility.ttl (EXTENSION)
URI: https://cogito.iot.linkeddata.es/def/facility#Storey
Label: Storey
Definition: A subclass of bot:Storey and, as such, is contained (bot:hasStorey) in one facility:Building, and is intended to contain (bot:hasSpace) one or more facility:Space that are horizontally connected.

Concept: Property
Ontology: building.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#hasSpace
Label: has space
Definition: Relation to spaces contained in a zone.

Concept: Class
Ontology: brick.ttl (EXTENSION)
URI: https://w3id.org/rec#Zone
Label: Zone
Definition: A sub-zone within or outside of a building defined to support some technology and/or use, e.g., an HVAC zone, a parking space, a security zone, etc.

URI: https://pi.pauwel.be/voc/buildingelement#BuildingElement

Label: Element

entidades_recuperadas.texto:
Concept: Property
Ontology: bot.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#hasElement
Label: has element
Definition: Links a Zone to an Element that is either contained in, adjacent to or intersecting with the Zone. The intended use of this relationship is not to be stated explicitly, but to be inferred from its sub-properties. It will, for example, allow one to query for all the doors of a building given that they have an adjacency to spaces of the building.

Concept: Property
Ontology: bot.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#intersectingElement
Label: intersecting element
Definition: Bir Bölge ve onunla kesişen bir yapı Elemanı arasındaki ilişki.

Concept: Property
Ontology: bot.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#adjacentElement
Label: adjacent element
Definition: 区域中相邻建筑构件之间的关系，以该区域为界。

Concept: Class
Ontology: bot.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bot#Zone
Label: 区域
Definition: بخشی از دنیای فیزیکی، و یا مجازی که اساساً در دنیا وجود دارد و دارای حدود مکانی سه بعدی است. زیرکلاس‌های bot:Zone عبارتند از bot:Site، bot:Building، bot:Storey، وbot:Space.
 یک عنصر bot:Zone میتواند دربرگیرنده‌ی عناصر دیگری از جنس bot:Zone  باشد و به این گونه امکان گروه بندی و جداسازی مناطق ختلف بوجود می‌آید. یک عنصر bot:Zone می‌تواند هم‌جوار عناصر دیگری از جنس bot:Zone باشد. در پایان، یک عنصر bot:Zone می‌تواند آغازگر دو نوع رابطه با عناصر bot:Element باشد که شامل دربرگیرندگی (bot:containsElement) وهم‌جواری  (bot:adjacentElement)  است.

Concept: Property

Label: acts on property
Definition: Relation between an Actuation and the property of a FeatureOfInterest it is acting upon.

entidades_recuperadas.texto:
Concept: Class
Ontology: dstv.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://standards.buildingsmart.org/IFC/DEV/IFC4/ADD2_TC1/OWL#Material
Label: Material
Definition: Material is a homogeneous or inhomogeneous substance that can be used to form elements (physical products or their components). Material is the basic entity for material designation and definition; this includes identification by name and classification (via reference to an external classification). Material must have a name (=material grade e.g. S355JR) and a category (=material e.g. Steel, Aluminium etc.). Material defines the planned/proposed material. The finally used material is stored in the property set.

Concept: Class
Ontology: bpo.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://w3id.org/bpo#Element
Label: element
Definition: An element is the description of an object that cannot be or is not composed of other components. Elements do not necessarily have to be non decomposable, since in some cases, objects may be simplified. Since this class does not have any predefined connection towards the element's material, no restriction regarding its material composition is in effect.
An element can never be an assembly as well, however it can be a product.

Concept: Class
Ontology: th_sharedvocalulary.owl (CORE)
URI: https://www.auto.tuwien.ac.at/downloads/thinkhome/ontology/BuildingOntologySharedVocabulary.owl#GeometricParameter
Label: GeometricParameter
Definition: Parameter describing the geometry of elements described in the building information model

Concept: Class
Ontology: beo.ttl (CORE)
URI: https://pi.pauwel.be/voc/buildingelement#BuildingElement
Label: Building Element
Definition: Comprises all elements that are primarily part of the construction of a building, i.e., its structural and space separating system. Building elements are all physically existent and tangible things.

Concept: Class
Ontology: building.ttl (CORE)
URI: http://bimerr.iot.linkeddata.es/def/building#BuildingElement
Label: Building Element
Definition: The building element comprises all elements that are primarily part of the construction of a building, i.e., its structural and space separating system. Building elements are all physically existent and tangible things.

s4inma_2019-04-30.n3: Zones are areas with spatial 3D volumes, and include, Buildings, Storeys, and Spaces.
bot.ttl: Zones are areas with spatial 3D volumes, and include, Buildings, Storeys, and Spaces.
Zones may intersect, or be adjacent to other zones.
Zones may have elements, either contained, adjacent, or intersecting it.
A adjacent zones and/or elements share some interface.
building.ttl: Zones may contain other zones, Buildings may contain storeys, Storeys may contain spaces.
There are building elements, which may have sub elements.
Zones and Elements have a 3D Model (including geometry, material, etc.).
beo.ttl: There are building elements, which may have sub elements.
Zones and Elements have a 3D Model (including geometry, material, etc.).
brick.ttl: There are building elements, which may have sub elements.
dstv.ttl: Zones and Elements have a 3D Model (including geometry, material, etc.).
bpo.ttl: Zones and Elements have a 3D Model (including geometry, material, etc.).
th_sharedvocalulary.owl: Zones and Elements have a 3D Model (including geometry, material, etc.).

veredicto_final:
**Veredicto Final**

Recomendación de Red:

1. **bot.ttl**
2. **building.ttl**
3. **dstv.ttl**

Justificación:

* **bot.ttl**: Esta ontología cubre una amplia gama de conceptos relacionados con zonas, elementos y modelos 3D. Su cobertura es especialmente importante en la descripción de relaciones entre zonas y elementos.
* **building.ttl**: Como su nombre indica, esta ontología se enfoca en edificios y sus componentes. Cubre conceptos como storeys, spaces y elementos constructivos, lo que la hace útil para describir estructuras complejas.
* **dstv.ttl**: Esta ontología se centra en la representación de modelos 3D y su relación con zonas y elementos. Su cobertura es especialmente importante en la descripción de geometría y materiales.

Observaciones:

La recomendada red de ontologías cubre una amplia gama de conceptos relacionados con edificios, zonas y elementos constructivos. Sin embargo, hay algunos requisitos que no están completamente cubiertos por esta recomendación. Por ejemplo:
* La ontología **s4inma_2019-04-30.n3** se enfoca en la definición de zonas y espacios, pero no proporciona información sobre edificios o elementos constructivos.
* La ontología **th_sharedvocalulary.owl** se centra en la representación de vocabularios compartidos, lo que puede ser útil para la interoperabilidad entre diferentes ontologías. Sin embargo, su cobertura es limitada y no proporciona información específica sobre edificios o elementos constructivos.

En resumen, la recomendada red de ontologías (bot.ttl, building.ttl y dstv.ttl) cubre una amplia gama de conceptos relacionados con edificios, zonas y elementos constructivos. Sin embargo, hay algunos requisitos que no están completamente cubiertos por esta recomendación, lo que sugiere la necesidad de considerar otras ontologías o recursos para completar la cobertura.
